name: YES BANK RESERV Credit Card

domestic: 3 complimentary domestic lounge visits per quarter for primary cardmember
Domestic lounge access is subject to a spend threshold of Rs 1,00,000 in the previous calendar quarter.
international: 6 complimentary international lounge visits in 12 months for primary and add-on cardmembers

exclusions: EMI transactions (including post-purchase and instant EMI)
joiningBenefits: 8,000 YES Rewardz points credited on joining fee realization
renewalBenefits: 8,000 YES Rewardz points credited on renewal fee realization
additionalBenefits: BookMyShow discount up to 25% on movie tickets (up to Rs 250 per transaction)
Purchase protection cover on eligible electronics
Green fee waiver and golf lessons at select golf courses
additionalDetails: First-year membership fee is waived on spending Rs 40,000 within 30 days of card issuance.

voucherRedemptions.note: 100 YES Rewardz points -> 10 Adani Reward Points

salaried: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK approval criteria
